{"type":"user.message","data":{"content":"Fix the authentication bug where expired tokens are accepted as valid","transformedContent":"Fix the authentication bug where expired tokens are accepted as valid. Context: src/auth/token_validator.py"}}
{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"content":"I'll fix the token validation bug. The issue is in `validate_token()` — it checks the signature but skips expiry verification.\n\n```python\ndef validate_token(token: str) -> TokenPayload:\n    payload = jwt.decode(token, SECRET_KEY, algorithms=[\"HS256\"])\n    if payload[\"exp\"] < time.time():\n        raise TokenExpiredError(\"Token has expired\")\n    return TokenPayload(**payload)\n```\n\nI've also added tests for expired, valid, and malformed tokens.","outputTokens":156}}
